rows.key_limitation: No neural long-context reasoning; relies on lexical signals.
rows.structural_takeaway: Strong lexical baseline, no neural long-context reasoning.

rows.key_limitation: No neural long-context reasoning; relies on lexical features.
rows.key_settings: TF-IDF + Logistic Regression, max_features=100000, ngram=[1, 2], min_df=2, max_df=0.95, sublinear_tf=True, class_weight=balanced
rows.structural_takeaway: Strong lexical baseline, no neural long-context reasoning.

rows.key_limitation: Classical lexical baseline; tuning does not add semantic long-context reasoning.
rows.structural_takeaway: Tunes the lexical baseline and establishes a stronger classical reference point.

rows.key_limitation: This is a truncation baseline: each document is tokenized once and only the first max_length tokens are available to the classifier.
rows.structural_takeaway: Shows what happens when long documents are clipped.

rows.key_limitation: This is a truncation baseline: each document is tokenized once and only the first max_length tokens are available to the classifier.
rows.structural_takeaway: Shows what happens when long documents are clipped.

rows.key_limitation: Chunk labels are weak labels inherited from the parent document; not every chunk necessarily contains evidence for the document label.
rows.key_settings: model=prajjwal1/bert-tiny, chunk_selection=first_k, aggregation=mean_proba, max_chunks_per_doc=4, chunk_size=100, overlap=20
rows.structural_takeaway: Structurally sees more text, but uses weak inherited chunk labels.

rows.key_limitation: Chunks inherit weak document labels and may lack class evidence.
rows.key_settings: model=prajjwal1/bert-tiny, chunk_selection=idf_top_k, aggregation=mean_proba, max_chunks_per_doc=8, chunk_size=220, overlap=40
rows.structural_takeaway: Structurally sees more text, but uses weak inherited chunk labels.

rows.key_limitation: Long-context transformers still have a maximum context window.
rows.structural_takeaway: Uses a transformer architecture designed for longer contexts, avoiding manual chunk aggregation but still bounded by max_length and compute.

rows.key_limitation: This is not full summarizer fine-tuning.
rows.structural_takeaway: Compresses long documents, but may discard class evidence.

warning: Smoke runs with tiny models and tiny sample sizes are useful engineering checks, not final model rankings.
